channel.title: Apothecaries Journal
channel.description: Apothecaries Journal explores the science, history, and future of medicine.

item.title: The Story of Aspirin
item.description: From willow bark to a modern medicine cabinet staple, aspirin is a story of observation and chemistry.

item.title: The Discovery of Penicillin
item.description: A chance encounter in a London lab ignited the antibiotic era and changed medicine forever.

item.title: How Vaccines Work
item.description: Training the immune system to fight disease through safe rehearsal and memory.

item.title: Pharmacy Myths and Facts
item.description: Separating evidence from misinformation in everyday care.
